---
title: "Airline Delay Prediction"
author: "Aishani Pradhan, Avery Wang"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Reading the Data

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
```

![]()

```{r}
# Read data
flights2023 <- read_csv("data/flights2023.csv")
flights2024 <- read_csv("data/flights2024.csv")

# Combine
flights <- bind_rows(flights2023, flights2024)

# Keep only departing PIT flights if arrivals are included
# Remove flights with no delay info
flights <- flights %>%
  filter(ORIGIN == "PIT") %>%
  filter(!is.na(DEP_DEL15))

```

```{r}
head(flights)
```

## Filtering

```{r}
# Columns to keep
keep_cols <- c(
  "YEAR", "MONTH", "DAY_OF_MONTH", "DAY_OF_WEEK", "FL_DATE",
  "OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER", "TAIL_NUM", "OP_CARRIER_FL_NUM", "DEST", "DEST_STATE_ABR",
  "CRS_DEP_TIME",
  "DISTANCE", "DEP_DEL15"
)

flights <- flights %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(keep_cols))
```

## Preprocessing

```{r}
str(flights)
```

```{r}
# Corrected data types

flights <- flights %>%
  mutate(
    FL_DATE = parse_date_time(FL_DATE, orders = "mdY IMS p"),
    FL_DATE = as.Date(FL_DATE),

    YEAR = as.factor(YEAR),
    MONTH = as.factor(MONTH),
    DAY_OF_WEEK = as.factor(DAY_OF_WEEK),

    OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER = as.factor(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER),
    DEST = as.factor(DEST),
    DEST_STATE_ABR = as.factor(DEST_STATE_ABR),

    #DEP_DEL15 = as.factor(DEP_DEL15)
  )
```

```{r}
str(flights)
```

## EDA+Feature Engineering

```{r, eval = FALSE}
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME)

# Time-based features
flights <- flights %>%
  mutate(
    dep_hour = floor(CRS_DEP_TIME / 100),

    time_of_day = case_when(
      dep_hour >= 5  & dep_hour < 12 ~ "Morning",
      dep_hour >= 12 & dep_hour < 17 ~ "Afternoon",
      dep_hour >= 17 & dep_hour < 21 ~ "Evening",
      TRUE ~ "Night"
    ),

    day_type = if_else(
      as.numeric(as.character(DAY_OF_WEEK)) %in% c(1, 7),
      "Weekend",
      "Weekday"
    )
  )

# Historical carrier day delay rate:
# only earlier flights that same day for that carrier
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, CRS_DEP_TIME) %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_day_delay_rate =
      lag(cumsum(DEP_DEL15), default = 0) /
      pmax(row_number() - 1, 1)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_day_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_day_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier-route delay rate:
# all previous flights for this airline-destination pair
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME) %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_route_delay_rate =
      lag(cumsum(DEP_DEL15), default = 0) /
      pmax(row_number() - 1, 1)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_route_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_route_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier-flight-number delay rate:
# all previous flights with this airline + flight number
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME) %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, OP_CARRIER_FL_NUM) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_flight_delay_rate =
      lag(cumsum(DEP_DEL15), default = 0) /
      pmax(row_number() - 1, 1)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_flight_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_flight_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical destination delay rate:
# all previous flights to that destination
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME) %>%
  group_by(DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    dest_delay_rate =
      lag(cumsum(DEP_DEL15), default = 0) /
      pmax(row_number() - 1, 1)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dest_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, dest_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier-month delay rate:
# all previous flights in that carrier-month combination
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME) %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, MONTH) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_month_delay_rate =
      lag(cumsum(DEP_DEL15), default = 0) /
      pmax(row_number() - 1, 1)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_month_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_month_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# This chunk calculates delay rates in the same groups as above, but over all of 23-24 flights

# I'll keep the carrier day delay rate the same, but add a column with # of flights in the day
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, CRS_DEP_TIME) %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_day_delay_rate =
      lag(cumsum(DEP_DEL15), default = 0) /
      pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    n_flights_day = n()
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_day_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_day_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Delay rate for all flights for carrier-destination pair
# Do not create a # of flights column because we assume the routes are flown somewhat frequently
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_route_delay_rate =
      mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Delay rate for all flights to a given destination
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    dest_delay_rate =
      mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Delay rate for all carrier flights in the same month to capture seasonality
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, MONTH) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_month_delay_rate =
      mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Delay rate for all carrier flights
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_delay_rate =
      mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
head(flights)
```

## Logistic Regression - aishani

## Logistic Regression with Ridge - aishani

## Logistic Regression with Lasso - aishani

throw everything here

## Random Forest - avery

## Boosting - avery

## SVM? - avery

## Neural Nets – if everything sucks - aishani
